description: Add authentication system, improve data persistence, enhance user experience, and add missing critical features to the Saju-MBTI app

userStories.title: Add Firebase Authentication System
userStories.description: Implement Firebase Auth with email/password and social login (Google, Apple) to enable user accounts and cross-device data sync
acceptanceCriteria: Firebase SDK installed and configured in package.json
Firebase config file created at src/lib/firebase.ts with auth initialization
AuthContext created at src/contexts/AuthContext.tsx with login/logout/signup functions
Login page created at src/app/login/page.tsx with email/password form
Signup page created at src/app/signup/page.tsx with email/password form
Google OAuth login button functional on login page
Protected route middleware added to require auth for history/settings pages
User can successfully sign up with email/password
User can successfully log in with email/password
User session persists across page refreshes
Logout functionality works and clears session

userStories.title: Migrate localStorage to Firebase Firestore
userStories.description: Replace localStorage-based storage with Firestore to enable cloud sync and data persistence across devices
acceptanceCriteria: Firestore service created at src/lib/firestore.ts with CRUD operations
storage.ts refactored to use Firestore instead of localStorage as backend
User history saved to Firestore under users/{userId}/history collection
User preferences saved to Firestore under users/{userId}/preferences document
Backward compatibility: existing localStorage data migrated to Firestore on first login
History page loads data from Firestore for authenticated users
Settings page saves to Firestore for authenticated users
All data operations work offline with Firestore offline persistence
Data syncs automatically when coming back online

userStories.title: Add User Profile Page
userStories.description: Create comprehensive user profile management with personal info, saved MBTI, birth info, and account settings
acceptanceCriteria: Profile page created at src/app/profile/page.tsx
Displays user email, display name, and profile photo
Allows editing display name and uploading profile photo
Shows saved MBTI type and allows updating it
Shows saved birth information for Saju calculations
Profile data saves to Firestore users/{userId}/profile
Navigation link added to BottomNav for profile access
TypeScript types updated in src/types/index.ts for UserProfile

userStories.title: Implement Push Notifications
userStories.description: Use existing @capacitor/push-notifications dependency to send daily fortune reminders and compatibility alerts
acceptanceCriteria: Push notification service created at src/lib/pushNotifications.ts
User can enable/disable notifications in settings page
User can choose notification time for daily fortune (default 9:00 AM)
Daily fortune notification sent at chosen time with preview text
Notification permission requested on first app launch
Clicking notification opens relevant page (daily fortune page)
Notification preferences saved to Firestore
Works on both Android and iOS platforms

userStories.title: Add Error Boundaries and Error Handling
userStories.description: Implement comprehensive error handling, error boundaries, and user-friendly error messages throughout the app
acceptanceCriteria: React Error Boundary component created at src/components/ErrorBoundary.tsx
Error boundary wraps all pages in layout.tsx
Custom error page created at src/app/error.tsx
Toast notification system added for user feedback (success/error/info)
All async operations have try-catch with user-friendly error messages
Network errors show retry button
Form validation errors display inline near form fields
Loading states added to all data fetching operations
404 page created at src/app/not-found.tsx

userStories.title: Add Social Sharing Features
userStories.description: Use @capacitor/share to allow users to share their fortune results, MBTI compatibility, and destiny characters
acceptanceCriteria: Share button added to Saju result page with formatted text and emoji
Share button added to MBTI compatibility page
Share button added to Destiny character page
Share button added to Daily fortune widget
Share function creates formatted message with app name and result summary
Share works on both Android and iOS using Capacitor Share API
Share includes deep link back to app (if result has shareable ID)

userStories.title: Optimize Performance and Bundle Size
userStories.description: Improve app performance with code splitting, lazy loading, and bundle optimization
acceptanceCriteria: Dynamic imports added for large components (RadarChart, FloatingOrbs)
Image optimization configured in next.config.js
Unused dependencies removed from package.json
Bundle analyzer report generated showing <500KB main bundle
Loading skeletons added for async-loaded components
Framer-motion animations optimized with will-change CSS
next/dynamic used for heavy calculation modules
Lighthouse performance score >90 on mobile

userStories.title: Add Comprehensive Testing Suite
userStories.description: Set up testing infrastructure with unit tests, integration tests, and E2E tests
acceptanceCriteria: Jest and React Testing Library installed
Test setup file created at src/setupTests.ts
Unit tests created for src/lib/sajuCalculator.ts with >80% coverage
Unit tests created for src/lib/mbtiCompatibility.ts with >80% coverage
Component tests created for GlassCard, BottomNav, DailyFortuneWidget
Integration tests for auth flow (login, signup, logout)
Test command 'npm test' runs all tests successfully
CI/CD workflow would pass (dry-run test suite completes without errors)

userStories.title: Enhance Settings Page with Theme and Preferences
userStories.description: Expand settings page with theme toggle, language selection, data export, and account management
acceptanceCriteria: Dark mode toggle added to settings page
Dark mode theme CSS variables defined in globals.css
Theme preference saved to Firestore and applied on load
Export data button generates JSON file of user's history and preferences
Delete account button with confirmation modal
Clear history button with confirmation
App version displayed at bottom of settings
Privacy policy and terms of service links added

userStories.title: Add Onboarding Flow for New Users
userStories.description: Create welcoming onboarding experience that collects initial MBTI and birth info
acceptanceCriteria: Onboarding component created at src/components/Onboarding.tsx
Step 1: Welcome screen with app introduction
Step 2: MBTI selection with visual type descriptions
Step 3: Birth information input form
Step 4: Notification permission request
Onboarding shows only once after first signup
Skip button allows users to complete onboarding later
Collected data saves to user profile in Firestore
Smooth animations between onboarding steps

technicalNotes.currentStack: Next.js 16.1.6, React 18.2, Capacitor 5.6, Framer Motion, Tailwind CSS, TypeScript
securityConsiderations: Firebase security rules must restrict user data access
Data encryption at rest (handled by Firebase)

outOfScope: Real-time chat or social networking features
